templates.name: Can I return a gift card?
templates.content: We would like to share Gift cards are not refundable, and we are not able to provide refunds of Gift card purchases. Also, please know Gift cards cannot be exchanged for cash or applied to credit accounts.

templates.name: Warranty policy
templates.content: You can take a look at our full warranty policy here: https://www.brighton.com/pages/returns#:~:text=Warranty,occured%20during%20the%20manufacturing%20process.

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a rewards/referral program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://www.brighton.com/pages/brighton-insider-1

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://www.brighton.com/pages/store-locator

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at consumercare@brighton.commail. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://help.brighton.com/hc/en-us/articles/19722181805851-What-is-your-return-policy#:~:text=Shop%20with%20confidence%20knowing%20that,Customized%20items

templates.name: Sizing (shoes)
templates.content: Happy to help you find the right size! Our shoes generally run true to size. Would you mind sharing your usual size?

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over 75$. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at consumercare@brighton.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: What is the status of my order?
templates.content: Once your order ships, you'll receive an email with the tracking number. Use this number to track your order's progress and know when to expect delivery. Please note that it may take up to 24 hours for your order to be scanned into the shipping carrier's system, which is necessary for an estimated delivery date.

templates.name: Where are your items made / manufactured? (shoes)
templates.content: The majority of Brighton footwear is manufactured in Italy or Brazil. A few of our specialty items, such as flip-flops, sneakers and espadrilles, are produced in China and India.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/brightoncollectibles/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/BrightonCollectibles

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at consumercare@brighton.com or call us on (800) 628-7687. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Do you have replacement parts for my Brighton watch?
templates.content: We do have several replacement parts available for many Brighton timepiece styles. Ordering is easy; you can purchase directly from us! Please follow this link for more information: https://help.brighton.com/hc/en-us/articles/19738392944411-Do-you-have-replacement-parts-for-my-Brighton-watch

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content:
We offer 3 methods of shipping - standard, expedited, and next day. For standard shipping, you should receive your order in 5-7 business days. Expedited shipping arrives within 2-3 business days and Next Day within 1-2 business days. 
For more information please follow this link: https://help.brighton.com/hc/en-us/articles/19721949099931-How-does-shipping-work-with-Brighton

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: You can initiate your return here: https://returns.brighton.com
